description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI/CD that runs on push to master and develop branches, on pull requests to those branches, and on a daily schedule. The workflow should have a build job that runs on multiple OS environments (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest) with various Python versions (3.9, 3.5-3.8, pypy3), checks out the code, sets up Python, installs dependencies with make install, runs tests with nosetests or make test, and uploads coverage to Codecov for ubuntu-latest with Python 3.9.
